args.code:
import json

articles_data = locals()['var_function-call-14274774357462507823']['query_db_response']['results']

sports_keywords = [
    "sport", "game", "team", "match", "league", "cup", "athlet", "player", "coach",
    "football", "basketball", "baseball", "tennis", "golf", "racing", "olympic",
    "world series", "super bowl", "championship"
]

longest_description_length = -1
longest_description_title = ""

for article_str in articles_data:
    article = json.loads(article_str)
    title = article.get("title", "")
    description = article.get("description", "")
    
    is_sports_article = False
    for keyword in sports_keywords:
        if keyword.lower() in title.lower() or keyword.lower() in description.lower():
            is_sports_article = True
            break

    if is_sports_article:
        current_description_length = len(description)
        if current_description_length > longest_description_length:
            longest_description_length = current_description_length
            longest_description_title = title

print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(longest_description_title))

articles = json.loads(articles_json_str)

sports_keywords = [
    "sport", "game", "team", "match", "league", "cup", "athlet", "player", "coach",
    "football", "basketball", "baseball", "tennis", "golf", "racing", "olympic",

            is_sports_article = True
            break

    if is_sports_article:
        current_description_length = len(description)
        if current_description_length > longest_description_length:
            longest_description_length = current_description_length
            longest_description_title = title

print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(longest_description_title))

import json

articles_data_list = locals()['var_function-call-14274774357462507823']['query_db_response']['results']

sports_keywords = [
    "sport", "game", "team", "match", "league", "cup", "athlet", "player", "coach",
    "football", "basketball", "baseball", "tennis", "golf", "racing", "olympic",
    "world series", "super bowl", "championship"
]

longest_description_length = -1
longest_description_title = ""

# Iterate through each JSON string in the list and parse it
for article_str in articles_data_list:
    # Assuming each article_str is a single JSON object string

    title = article.get("title", "")

    for keyword in sports_keywords:

            break

        current_description_length = len(description)
        if current_description_length > longest_description_length:
            longest_description_length = current_description_length
            longest_description_title = title

print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(longest_description_title))

var_function-call-14274774357462507823.title: Iraq Halts Oil Exports from Main Southern Pipeline (Reuters)
var_function-call-14274774357462507823.description: Reuters - Authorities have halted oil export\flows from the main pipeline in southern Iraq after\intelligence showed a rebel militia could strike\infrastructure, an oil official said on Saturday.

var_function-call-14274774357462507823.title: Oil prices soar to all-time record, posing new menace to US economy (AFP)
var_function-call-14274774357462507823.description: AFP - Tearaway world oil prices, toppling records and straining wallets, present a new economic menace barely three months before the US presidential elections.
